programme.title: Somebody's Gotta Do It
programme.desc: Dragon Forge : Mike visits the Dragon Forge shop where father and son blacksmiths Craig and Rory May teach him how to bend steel using old-time, anvil-banging, heavy metal forging.

programme.title: Wardens
programme.desc: Sturgeon Spearing : Michigan's District 3 is home to the state's only sturgeon spearing season. The limit is low, but the reward can be a fish of a lifetime.

programme.title: Wardens
programme.desc: U.P. Snowmobile Patrol : Michigan Conservation Officers in the U.P. have a lengthy snowmobile season to patrol. From sound checks to safe riding on trails, it's never a dull day in the snow.

programme.title: Wardens
programme.desc: Shining Surveillance Part 1 : There's no shining for wildlife on public ground during the month of November in Michigan. To comabt that, an aerial patrol at night is utilized.

programme.title: Wardens
programme.desc: Shining Surveillance Part 2 : There's no shining for wildlife on public ground during the month of November in Michigan. To comabt that, an aerial patrol at night is utilized.

programme.title: Wardens
programme.desc: First Day of Deer Season : Michigan hunters harvested the second most whitetails in the country. Keeping track of everyone in the field requires near 24/7 surveillance.

programme.title: Wardens
programme.desc: Illegal Blinds : Hunting blinds can not be left on state land year-round. When officers find blinds that need to be removed, they search high and low for the owners.

programme.title: Wardens
programme.desc: Bears in the U.P. : It can take 7 years to draw a bear tag in Michigan's U.P. Conservation Officers make sure everyone plays by the same rules, so no one has an advantage.

programme.title: Wardens
programme.desc: Westside Fishing : The westside of Michigan has some of the state's best fishing spots. From inland rivers to the Great Lakes, C.O.s know their fall will be spent watching anglers.

programme.title: Wardens
programme.desc: Best of: Michigan Whitetail Patrol : Michigan's archery deer season lasts 77 days and the regular firearm season is 16 days long. Over that time period, C.O.'s use a variety of tactics to make sure everyone is playing by the rules.

programme.title: Wardens
programme.desc: Pure Michigan : The state of Michigan is highlighted through a contest to win hunting licenses and over $4000 in prizes. Officers also patrol during a summer boating festival and the firearm deer season.

programme.title: Shipping Wars
programme.desc: T-Wrecks : As Dwight and Tyesha tangle with an animatronic T-Rex and chop it down to size, Doug bites off more than he can chew when moving a massive backyard Pirate Ship playhouse.

programme.title: Shipping Wars
programme.desc: Bowling for Candy : Molly and Russell get boxed in by the seller of a rare arcade bowling game with his shipping demands, while Tamara's haul of movie statues to Minnesota's largest candy store heats up with a large, flame-throwing side load.

programme.title: Shipping Wars
programme.desc: Golf Claps and Bumper Car Scraps : Natasha is amused by her classic bumper car haul but will the ride stay intact on her rig? Meanwhile, Tamara's mini-golf run turns south quickly when the 12 piece pick up turns into a 100 item load.

programme.title: Shipping Wars
programme.desc: Ghosts and Floats : Molly and Russell discover that the "magic of movies" is just an illusion when they attempt to haul an iconic picture car for a film premiere.

programme.title: Shipping Wars
programme.desc: Here's the Throne, Here's the Steeple : A giant church steeple makes Natasha question her faith in a forklift, when she's the lone soul to complete the task of loading it. And winter comes for Dwight and Tyesha with a royal run comprising of a beautifully handcrafted throne.

programme.title: Shipping Wars
programme.desc: Glamping on a Gondola : A load of vintage ski gondolas take Molly and Russell from the mountains of Vermont to the Colorado Rockies on a run that is somehow, only an uphill climb.

programme.title: Shipping Wars
programme.desc: Keep Calm and Carry Salon : Natasha heads to the high desert for a showdown when she spearheads the transport of a roller derby track. Meanwhile, Molly and Russ have an unrelaxing spa day, moving the contents of a salon across a small Florida town.

programme.title: Shipping Wars
programme.desc: Fowl Play : While hauling a flock of live ducks and chickens to a new home, Dwight and Tyesha learn why farm animals don't always make good road companions.

programme.title: Shipping Wars
programme.desc: The Camel Clutch : Dwight & Tyesha get some heat when shipping a wrestling ring in Austin and the tight deadline puts them against the ropes. And will Molly & Russell's delivery of a rare blue-eyed baby camel help them get over their fighting hump?

programme.title: Shipping Wars
programme.desc: Gaming the Ninja : Natasha meets her match during a quest to deliver a massive assortment of arcade games to an anime convention. Doug shows off his trucking gladiator skills while transporting a ninja training course.

programme.title: Shipping Wars
programme.desc: Racing For Neon : While Dwight & Tyesha race to inflate an important delivery for a young entrepreneur, Doug lights up when he gets an opportunity to flex his handyman skills transporting a fragile neon sign to an avid collector in the Windy City.

programme.title: Somebody's Gotta Do It
programme.desc: Pageant of the Masters : Mike participates in the annual Pageant of the Masters festival where he helps bring Leonardo da Vinci's painting "The Last Supper” to life.

programme.title: Somebody's Gotta Do It
programme.desc: Mennonite Chicken : Mike meets a French entrepreneur and chef who uses traditional Mennonite farming methods to produce a better tasting chicken.

programme.title: Somebody's Gotta Do It
programme.desc: Disaster City : Mike visits Disaster City to train with first responders in preparation for any sort of global catastrophe.

programme.title: Somebody's Gotta Do It
programme.desc: Whooping Crane : Mike visits a wild life and research institute with the some abnormal methods for saving endangered birds.

programme.title: Somebody's Gotta Do It
programme.desc: Goat Cheese : Mike meets a former hippie turned successful entrepreneur who is rethinking the dairy farm and making delicious goat cheese.

programme.title: Somebody's Gotta Do It
programme.desc: Kings of Neon : Mike meets an artist who is changing the look of his hometown of Austin, Texas with beautiful neon folk art.

programme.title: Somebody's Gotta Do It
programme.desc: Le Reve : Mike witnesses the back stage magic at one of the biggest shows in Las Vegas and meets the man responsible for it all.

programme.title: Somebody's Gotta Do It
programme.desc: Hair Museum + Dog Colorist : Mike visits a museum dedicated to hair and its charming curator. Then Mike meets a hairstylist who has found the perfect canvas is man’s best friend.

programme.title: Somebody's Gotta Do It
programme.desc: Mütter Museum : Mike visits a medical museum and meets the historical record keeper of the human body in all of its glory, suffering, pain, and splendor.

programme.title: Somebody's Gotta Do It
programme.desc: Chad Pregracke : Mike meets the man who is pulling millions of pounds of trash from America’s waterways.

programme.title: The Island with Bear Grylls
programme.desc: Episode 1 : In this third season, a group of men and a group of women are abandoned on the opposite side of the same island. Neither knows the other is there. Will these two small groups survive - and what will happen when they meet?

programme.title: The Island with Bear Grylls
programme.desc: Episode 2 : The women catch sight of a man in the distance, and when they go to investigate the two groups finally meet. But as a vicious tropical storm rolls in, the thunder and lightning have a devastating effect on amputee and war veteran Hannah.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: Legends of Awesomeness
programme.desc: A Tigress Tale : When Master Mugan from the Garnet Palace decides she needs a new Kung Fu Master, Tigress volunteers. Will the Furious Five be minus one or will Po convince Tigress to return to the Jade Palace?

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: Legends of Awesomeness
programme.desc: Master and the Panda : When Po's friend Peng returns to the Valley of Peace, everyone is excited...except for Po. What no one else knows is that Peng is actually evil Tai Lung's nephew. Now Po has to admit to powerful Peng that he is the one who skadooshed his uncle.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: Legends of Awesomeness
programme.desc: Present Tense : As the annual Winter Festival approaches, Po doesn't have enough money to buy his dad the present he deserves, so he takes a job as a bounty hunter to capture a dangerous escaped convict for the reward. But Po's plan doesn't go as smooth as he hoped.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: Legends of Awesomeness
programme.desc: Royal Pain : Po takes on the challenge of training a lovable but klutzy member of the Emperor's family. However, will Po's training be enough to protect them both from the evil designs of a traitor in their midst?

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: Legends of Awesomeness
programme.desc: Bosom Enemies : After dealing Taotie yet another humiliating defeat, Po is horrified to learn that the villainous warthog has had a full on nervous breakdown. Po is determined to heal his spirit and Taotie is eager to change his evil ways...or is he?

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: Legends of Awesomeness
programme.desc: Secret Admirer : When Po's fake love letter prank on Monkey backfires, the duo's relationship is put to the test in a story of jealousy, betrayal and, yes, even kidnapping.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: Legends of Awesomeness
programme.desc: Invitation Only : Po is sad when he learns that everyone has been invited to a dinner party except for him, due to his poor table manners. Will Shifu be able to teach Po proper etiquette AND foil the attack of evil Temutai and his army?

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: Legends of Awesomeness
programme.desc: Shifu's Ex : When Shifu's ex-girlfriend, Mei Ling, visits the Jade Palace, Po decides to try and get them back together, despite the fact Mei Ling is now Shifu's most hated enemy.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: Legends of Awesomeness
programme.desc: Shoot the Messenger : Po and Tigress must track down and stop a messenger from delivering a scroll that could thrust China into all-out war!

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: Legends of Awesomeness
programme.desc: Enter the Dragon Part 1 : Po and the Furious Five meet their greatest challenge yet: a supernatural creature who is invincible to the powers of kung fu.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: Legends of Awesomeness
programme.desc: The Eternal Chord : Po's qi is out of balance. He and his friends attempt to re-harmonize the panda using the tradition of musical kung fu. They better work fast, as only Po can stop the destruction of the Eternal Chord and un-creating the universe.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: Legends of Awesomeness
programme.desc: Apocalypse Yao : Po has to help Master Yao after Taotie and Bian Zao steal the Mystic Secrets of Kung Fu right out of the master's head.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: Legends of Awesomeness
programme.desc: Crazy Little Ling Called Love : Shifu's evil ex-girlfriend Mei Ling is back...and back together with Shifu! Dubious Po must find out if she is on the level or just using Shifu for her own criminal gain.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: Legends of Awesomeness
programme.desc: The Real Dragon Warrior : Po and Monkey discover a small village and meet an impostor claiming to be the Dragon Warrior. Po is determined to expose the fraud but could end up doing more harm than good.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: Legends of Awesomeness
programme.desc: The First Five : When Po throws a party and invites the First Furious Five to attend, everyone is shocked to learn that Shifu may not be the courageous hero that they thought he was.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: Legends of Awesomeness
programme.desc: Youth in Re-Volt : After Bian Zao steals magical lightning powers, he snubs his villain father Taotie and instead teams up with the vicious Tong Fo and the Croc Bandits. Will Po and Taotie knock some sense into Bian Zao before he uses his powers to destroy the village?

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: Legends of Awesomeness
programme.desc: See No Weevil : General Tsin is back with a crazy conspiracy theory about alien rice weevils trying to take over the world. When Po learns Tsin is telling the truth, it's up to the Kung Fu Panda to stop the invasion before it's too late.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: Legends of Awesomeness
programme.desc: Goose Chase : After Zeng unhappily quits his job at the Jade Palace, Po cheers up the weepy goose by telling him he could be a kung fu master. Bad idea, Po. Bad idea.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: Legends of Awesomeness
programme.desc: Face Full of Fear : With his childhood bully back in town, Po must learn to face his fear or risk losing his Dragon Warrior mojo and those that are most important to him.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: Legends of Awesomeness
programme.desc: Forsaken and Furious : Tired of Po getting all the credit and acclaim, the Furious Five quit the Jade Palace and strike out on their own.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: Legends of Awesomeness
programme.desc: Camp Ping : It's a battle between master and father when Shifu and Mr. Ping compete for Po's attention and affection during a camping trip. But will their competition get in the way of Po defeating the Valley's newest menace?

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: Legends of Awesomeness
programme.desc: Po the Croc : After a blow to the head leaves Po with amnesia, Fung and the Croc Bandits are more than happy to use it to their advantage...by convincing the Dragon Warrior that he is their evil bandit leader.

programme.title: Monsters vs. Aliens
programme.desc: Welcome to Area Fifty-Something : All is well at Area Fifty-Something with Team Monster, until a lone alien imprisons the President and makes a permanent home on base.

programme.title: Monsters vs. Aliens
programme.desc: Danger Wears a Diaper/The Toy From Another World : The president's birthday is here! Dr. C has made him a gadget that will make him appear younger, but instead blasts him to infanthood!

programme.title: Monsters vs. Aliens
programme.desc: The Bath Effect/The Fruit of All Evil : Susan makes B.O.B. think that baths cure crankiness - B.O.B. leaps into action, chasing after Coverton to cure his crankiness once and for all!

programme.title: Monsters vs. Aliens
programme.desc: Frenemy Mine/Maximum B.O.B. : B.O.B. is determined to have Coverton be his emergency buddy. Instead, Coverton chooses to manipulate B.O.B. at a time when he needs him the most.

programme.title: Monsters vs. Aliens
programme.desc: It Came...On a Field Trip/Educational Television : The Monsters find an alien in the woods doing an earth studies project, which has a lot of sensitive data that could be used for an invasion!

programme.title: Monsters vs. Aliens
programme.desc: Flipped Out/The Wormhole Has Turned : B.O.B. discovers a secret switch that General Monger tells him not to touch. Will it get rewired before the Big Blue Blob can get to flip it?

programme.title: Monsters vs. Aliens
programme.desc: The Two Faces of Dr. Cockroach/The Thing With One Brain : Dr. C is split into two through his new teleportation machine. Can the Monsters reunite the wild and brainy roaches before it's too late?

programme.title: Monsters vs. Aliens
programme.desc: Night of the Living Dog/Attack of the Movie Night : Sqweep fashions a canine brainwave device to make B.O.B. the perfect pet. It works great on everyone on the base but B.O.B.

programme.title: Monsters vs. Aliens
programme.desc: 98 Pound Cockroach/When Nature Shrieks : Dr. C doubles his strength, but lessens his genius. Can the other Monsters save him before it's too late?

programme.title: Monsters vs. Aliens
programme.desc: Screaming Your Calls/The Time-Out That Wouldn't End : When Dr. C invents a "living" smart-phone, Coverton diabolically plans to use the smart-phone to hack the base's mainframe.

programme.title: Monsters vs. Aliens
programme.desc: It Got Out of Hand/The Sound of Fear : It's April Fool's Day at Area Fifty-Something as Susan tries to prevent the Monsters from destroying the base with a prank! Dr. C's "Ph.D" is in jeopardy as a former teacher reveals a missing music grade in his transcript.

programme.title: Monsters vs. Aliens
programme.desc: Vornicarn : A new alien, Sta'abi, comes to Earth in search of a ferocious beast called Vornicarn. Soon, everyone is on a chase in order to save the planet from Vornicarn's terror!

programme.title: Monsters vs. Aliens
programme.desc: The Sorry Syndrome/Speak Not the Q Word : Susan is in a bind after spilling food on Sta'abi and apologizing about it. Insulted, Sta'abi hunts Susan to feed her "fralnick" to Vornicarn.

programme.title: Monsters vs. Aliens
programme.desc: It Came From Channel 5/It Ruled with an Iron Fist : Strange secrets begin to unfold when Derek returns to expose our friends at Area Fifty Something. Monger is away for the weekend! This is great news for Team Monster and Team Alien until they're introduced to Rule-Bot.

programme.desc: The Badger Game : A con artist pretends to be someone from back home and stays with the Clampetts. She plans to get photos of Jed in a compromising position in order to blackmail him.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The Gorilla : Jethro is chopping wood while a chimpanzee named May Bell watches. He wishes that he could teach May Bell to chop wood. When Elly May comes by, she and Jethro talk and decide that they want a gorilla.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Come Back Little Herby : The Clampetts miss Herbie and ask Mr. Drysdale to get the tame gorilla back. The banker promises to help, but actually hinders the effort.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jed In Politics : Granny's soap making sends noxious smoke into the air, which gets the attention of smog commissioner Tinsley. He shuts down the operation, and Jed decides to run against him when he misunderstands Mr. Drysdale's advice.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jed Joins The Board : Jed takes a job on the board of directors of O.K. Oil Company.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies

programme.desc: The Flying Saucer : Granny discovers Martians next door at the Drysdale mansion.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The Indians Are Coming : When Crowfoot Indians come to Beverly Hills to discuss a boundary dispute at the Clampett oil field, Granny prepares for war.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Elly Comes Out : After reading the Society page, Granny decides the best way to get Elly a husband is to throw her a coming out party, complete with possum burgers and gopher gravy. Mrs. Drysdale, hoping to forever humiliate them, is all too happy to help.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The Gypsy's Warning : The Clampketts come across Narda and Yerko, two gypsies, who decide to run a scam on the unsuspecting clan. Involving both a marriage prophecy and a curse, the crooks see the families' naivety to their advantage.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: His Royal Highness : The Clampetts are visited by a real king, Alexander, so Granny and Mrs. Drysdale start matchmaking. The broke royal needs a wealthy bride and courts Ellie. Drysdale niece Doreen is tricked by a costumed Jethro and ends up unimpressed.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Super Hawg : The Clampetts acquire a hippopotamus when an advertising scheme originated by banker Drysdale backfires.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jed Inherits A Castle : Jed Clampett has inherited a castle in the English countryside. Jethro insists that everyone, except Granny, wear the royal raiment's of Elizabeth (the First, of course).

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Clampetts In London : The Clampetts head to England to visit the castle Jed inherited. Misunderstandings abound, from Jethro mistaking San Francisco for London, to the impounding of Granny's medical supplies, to the real intentions of the elderly chemist.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Clampett Castle : The Clampetts finally make it to their new castle and try to adjust to the English way of castle life, at the least the way Jethro thinks it is, based on his understanding of English myths and legends.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies

programme.title: Fringe
programme.desc: The Road Not Taken : While investigating a disturbing case of a woman who apparently spontaneously combusted, Olivia is plagued with waking dreams, seeing elaborate visions of things not really there.

programme.title: Fringe

programme.title: Fringe

programme.title: Fringe

programme.desc: Among the guests on Graham's sofa are `Pirates' and `Lord of the Rings' star Orlando Bloom, on the West End stage for `Killer Joe', and comedy genius Stephen Merchant, voicing new animation `Sherlock Gnomes'.

programme.title: The Graham Norton Show
programme.desc: Together on Graham's sofa are Oscar-winner Matthew McConaughey in new crime adventure `Gold', actress Christina Ricci starring as Zelda Fitzgerald in `Z: The Beginning of Everything', top comedian Josh Widdicombe and singing superstar Ed Sheeran.

programme.title: The Graham Norton Show
programme.desc: Guests include star of `The Girl in the Spider's Web' Claire Foy, Hollywood action hero Kurt Russell, actor and comedian Lee Evans, and comedian and writer David Walliams. Also featuring music from Mumford & Sons.

programme.title: The Graham Norton Show
programme.desc: Joining Graham on the sofa are British stars Eddie Redmayne and Jude Law, appearing together in `Fantastic Beasts: The Crimes of Grindelwald'. Also, comic actor Melissa McCarthy, Oscar winner Emma Stone, and music from Rick Astley.

programme.title: The Graham Norton Show
programme.desc: Together on Graham's sofa are Hollywood stars Ryan Gosling and Emma Stone, together in `La La Land', as well as actor and director Ben Affleck and British star Sienna Miller together in the crime film `Live By Night'. Plus, music from Gregory Porter.

programme.desc: Together on Graham's sofa are `X-Men' star James McAvoy with his co-star Sarah Paulson, iconic star of `Withnail and I' Richard E Grant, and Steve Coogan and John C Reilly. Also featuring music from Westlife.

programme.title: The Graham Norton Show
programme.desc: Together on Graham's sofa are Oscar-winner Denzel Washington appearing in `Fences', Fifty Shades star Jamie Dornan, Keanu Reeves starring in `John Wick: Chapter 2', legendary comedian and actress Whoopi Goldberg, and music from Rag'n'Bone Man.

programme.title: The Graham Norton Show
programme.desc: Among the guests on Graham's sofa are Hollywood stars Ryan Reynolds and Josh Brolin, who star together in irreverent superhero sequel `Deadpool 2'. Plus, David Beckham, BAFTA-nominated actor Vanessa Kirby, and music legend Joan Armatrading.

programme.title: The Graham Norton Show
programme.desc: On Graham's festive sofa are: football legend David Beckham, from `Star Wars: The Force Awakens', Princess Leia herself Carrie Fisher and new stars Daisy Ridley and John Boyega, and pop superstar Kylie Minogue, who chats and sings.

programme.title: The Graham Norton Show

programme.title: The Graham Norton Show

programme.title: The Graham Norton Show
programme.desc: Guests on Graham's sofa include Hollywood stars Chris Pratt, Bryce Dallas Howard, and Jeff Goldblum, as well as British actress Thandie Newton. Plus, music from former Scissor Sister Jake Shears, who performs `Creep City'.

programme.desc: Whom Gods Destroy : Kirk and Spock deliver medicine to an insane asylum where a former Starfleet captain is being held. They discover that he has freed the inmates and is running the place.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series
programme.desc: Let That Be Your Last Battlefield : The Enterprise hosts two alien beings from the same planet who share an intense and self-destructive hatred of each other.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series
programme.desc: The Mark Of Gideon : Kirk beams down on a diplomatic mission. He finds himself on an Enterprise where all the crew has vanished, and only a mysterious woman resides.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series
programme.desc: That Which Survives : Kirk, McCoy, and Sulu are stranded on a barren planet where a mysterious woman attempts to kill them one at a time, while the Enterprise must travel halfway across the galaxy to rescue them.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series
programme.desc: The Way To Eden : The Enterprise picks up a group of space "hippies" looking for Eden.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series
programme.desc: The Cloud Minders : To acquire the resources to cure a space plague, Kirk must resolve a mining dispute between the cultural elites of the cloud city of Stratos and the miners on the surface.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series
programme.desc: The Savage Curtain : Kirk and Spock meet Abraham Lincoln and Surak of Vulcan and must battle with some of history's most terrible villains.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series
programme.desc: All Our Yesterdays : Kirk, Spock, and McCoy enter a time portal and get stuck in the past on a planet about to be consumed by a nova.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series
programme.desc: Turnabout Intruder : The Enterprise is in danger when Janice Lester, one of Kirk's former lovers, steals his body.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series

programme.desc: no info available

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Amanda's Secret: Forbidden Love Pt. 1 : Amanda, 25, says she was molested over 795 times by her father, Earl Nix, a secret when revealed to family was rejected despite Nix being convicted of first-degree criminal sexual conduct. The family comes face-to-face in an emotional attempt for truth.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Parental Abductions Pt. 1 : Families are devastated when children go missing, but oftentimes it is a parental abduction. Fifteen years ago, John Clark came home from work to find his wife and three children gone, leaving only a cryptic note saying they went on vacation. Part 1

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Ultimate Home Invasion : Mary says husband Jesse is abusive, unfaithful, controlling & she feels she's living in a prison. Jesse says he's not controlling, he's just "containing the beast," & his wife needs to abide by his rules if she wants to stay married. Dr. Sophy steps in.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: A Sister Intervention: The Boyfriend's Sordid Past Revealed Pt. 2 : Emotions run high when Kim’s sisters meet boyfriend Stacy for the first time and Dr. Phil reveals a shocking secret from Stacy’s past. What explanation does Stacy offer? How much did Kim know? Plus, Dr. Phil's advice for the family moving forward. Part 2

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Neighbor Feud Erupts With Constant Calls To The Police, False Allegations, Trumped Up Charges, And Threats Of Violence : Jana & Allen say neighbors Maritha & Melanie moved into the neighborhood: police reports, DFS, threats & their 4 dogs bark all hours of the night! Maritha & Melanie point to Jana & Allen, with Melanie being charged with misconduct for mooning a neighbor!

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Forced To Be A Father : Dr. Phil's guests engage in a heated debate about the rights of men and women when a child is conceived out of wedlock. Should the biological father be forced to pay child support for a child he didn't know existed or did not plan?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Meddling Moms : They track your every move and monitor your conversations. This may sound like the latest GPS locator, but they are actually meddling moms!

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Banned From The Wedding : A bride-to-be takes on her future mother-in-law in an ugly feud that has torn a family apart. Can Dr. Phil cut through the drama and broker some peace for this family?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Husband's Shocking Confession Pt. 2 : Michelle thought she had a perfect marriage until Wade admitted to keeping a horrible secret from his wife. Little did she know this one revelation would be the tip of the iceberg. Dr. Phil continues the startling story of Wade and Michelle. Part 2

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: At War With My Teen : What happens when a household is in total meltdown and filled with constant battles? Meet a mother who is afraid of her 17-year-old son and the stepfather who says he's caught in the middle. But is the boy the only one to blame for the chaos in the house?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Mind Control : It's hard to believe, but in America alone, there may be as many as 5,000 religious groups preying upon the weak and vulnerable, and all in the name of God. Dr. Phil's guests have warnings for you and your children.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Whatever Happened To...(Most Talked About Guests) : Do you ever wonder how your favorite Dr. Phil guest is faring since being on the show? Dr. Phil follows up with some of his most talked about guests.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Behind The Headlines: The Disappearance Of Caylee Anthony : Caylee Anthony's mom, Casey Anthony, has been named a person of interest in the case of the missing 3-year-old. Many fear the worst has happened. Dr. Phil examines the psychological aspects of the story that continues to grip America's imagination.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Family Drama : Family squabbles are hard to avoid -- especially during the holidays -- but what happens when that behavior escalates to cursing, yelling, and even physical attacks? Dr. Phil sits down with a family on the brink of falling apart.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Honeymoon Hangover : Are you newlyweds suffering Honeymoon Hangover? The Bahamas vacation is over, the dress is put away and couples realize they now have this to face: Married Life. Dr. Phil discovers how little couples know about each other before they walk down the aisle.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: For Better Or Worse : Some couples vow "for better or worse." With a 50% divorce rate in America, in the midst of marital crises ranging from separation to unfaithfulness, Dr. Phil helps manage rocky marriages. Dr.Phil tells how to survive infidelity or when to call it quits.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Marriage Crisis: Drowning In Debt : Money is the number one reason why couples say they get divorced. The country's current financial crisis has resulted in more couples getting buried in a landslide of debt which takes its toll on a marriage. Is your marriage on the rocks because of debt?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Make It Or Break It : Tammy and Paul wed for eight years until their marriage ended. After nine months apart the couple secretly remarried, unbeknownst to their families, who would not approve. Weeks after saying "I do" a second time, the two are having doubts of their own.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Affairs Of The Heart : Can married people be friends with someone of the opposite sex without sex getting in the way? At what point does a friendly relationship become an affair of the heart or emotional infidelity? Meet Randy, who says his wife, Amanda, has crossed that line.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Risky Teen Behavior : How well do you know your teenager? Could your child be participating in risky or illegal activities right under your own roof?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: The Love Triangle : A recent study shows that the number of men and women having extramarital affairs is on the rise. Could your spouse be cheating on you? Dr. Phil's guests are struggling with the aftermath of infidelity.

programme.desc: Theo makes amends after causing a scene at Jonny's departure. Chris and Olivia hit the rocks again. Alex and Montana get closer, but will they make it official?

programme.title: Love Island
programme.desc: Two familiar faces return to the villa, leaving single girls Olivia, Georgia and Tyla wondering who fancies whom. Later, the boys get the girls' hearts racing in a striptease challenge.

programme.title: Love Island
programme.desc: Mike and Sam make their moves on Tyla and Georgia. Later, a recoupling is announced, meaning one lad will be going home before the night is over.

programme.title: Love Island

programme.title: Love Island
programme.desc: With things looking good for Sam and Georgia, some of the islanders question Mike and Tyla's relationship. Camilla and Jamie talk about their future.

programme.title: Love Island
programme.desc: The second week continues and the islanders are already experiencing a summer they'll never forget. But as ever, there are plenty of twists and turns for them, and with £50,000 up for grabs for the winners, everybody's in it for the long haul.

programme.title: Love Island
programme.desc: The temperature's rising and there are plenty more surprises in store. As ever, nothing is quite what it seems in paradise. And with that cash prize of £50,000 up for grabs for the winning couple in seven weeks' time, everyone wants to couple up.

programme.title: Love Island
programme.desc: The temperature just keeps on rising in paradise. Our gorgeous young things are having an absolute blast, but some are coupling while others are in danger of being dumped. Right now - nobody wants to go home.

programme.title: Love Island
programme.desc: It's the end of week two and the islanders are having the time of their lives, but as the love games continue, no-one knows what's waiting around the next corner. And with just one couple in with a chance of winning, the battle to stay is on.

programme.title: Love Island
programme.desc: Unseen Bits : It's time for another feast of unseen moments from the villa. All the flirting, fun, romance and juiciest gossip is waiting right here, along with a recap of all the big stories and the best moments of the week.

programme.title: Love Island
programme.desc: Week three on `Love Island' is under way, and the temperature is rising yet again. For the cast of gorgeous islanders, it's already been a summer they'll never forget. But with a 50,000 pound prize awaiting our winning couple, can anyone be trusted?

programme.title: Love Island
programme.desc: It's week three on `Love Island' and the islanders are soaking up the sunshine in their very own luxury villa. It just doesn't get better than this, but behind the flirting and romance, who's for real and who's just playing the game?

programme.title: Love Island
programme.desc: The islanders are having the time of their lives as they flirt and frolic in the Spanish sunshine, but they all know that only one couple will have the chance of walking away with the 50,000 pound prize.

programme.title: Love Island
programme.desc: It's week three on `Love Island' and our gorgeous guys and girls are definitely making the most of their unforgettable summer in paradise. But while the sun keeps on shining, the twists and turns just keep on coming.

programme.title: Love Island
programme.desc: Things are getting hotter by the day on 'Love Island'. While the islanders are enjoying the summer of a lifetime, they all know there are plenty more surprises in store.

programme.title: Love Island
programme.desc: It's been a turbulent third week in the villa and there are plenty more surprises in store for the islanders. It might look like paradise, but `Love Island' life is always a challenge.

programme.title: Love Island
programme.desc: Unseen Bits : It's that time again so strap yourselves in for another jam-packed hour of exclusive unseen moments and all the big stories from the villa. What a seven days it has been, featuring gossip, drama, fun, flirting and romance galore.

programme.title: Love Island
programme.desc: It's week four in paradise as the islanders continue to enjoy their summer. There are plenty more surprises in store, and while they might have arrived dreaming of romance, that £50,000 prize means that not everyone may be in this for love.

programme.title: JAG
programme.desc: Rouge : As the lowest ranking lawyer at JAG, Bud is assigned to accompany Raglan, a former Special Forces operative who is hired by the Pentagon to test security at military bases.

programme.title: JAG
programme.desc: To Russia With Love : With evidence that his missing father could still be alive in, Harm convinces the Admiral to give him time off so he can go to Russia. In Moscow, they are questioned by Mark Falcon, the KGB agent who had stolen a list of POW's earlier from Harm.

programme.title: JAG
programme.desc: Gypsy Eyes : Unable to lose the pursuing Russian fighters, Harm's and Mac’s hijacked Mig is shot out of the sky over Siberia.

programme.title: JAG
programme.desc: Act of Terror : When Arab terrorists attach a mine to a US Navy warship in an attempt to sink it, Marine guards are able to kill one and capture the other, even after the mine explodes, killing two sailors.

programme.title: JAG
programme.desc: The Black Jet : Harm and Mac are sent to Teheran, Iran to represent a Navy flier whose Stealth jet crashed in Iran due to a major mechanical failure.

programme.title: JAG
programme.desc: Drop Zone : Mac is prosecuting a SEAL jumpmaster charged with causing the death of one of his men during a parachute insertion exercise.

programme.title: JAG
programme.desc: Overdue And Presumed Lost : A salvage company tries to claim rights to the wreckage of the USS Dolphin, a WW2 submarine that was lost the day before the attack on Pearl Harbor in 1941.

programme.title: JAG
programme.desc: Real Deal Seal : Medal of Honor Navy SEAL Lt. Curtis Rivers is court-martialed for punching a Congressional candidate who claims to be a Navy SEAL.

programme.title: JAG
programme.desc: A Separate Peace, Part I : RAdm. Boone has become nominated to serve as ComSixthFleet and to get his third star. Days before the Senate confirmation hearing, SecNav receives an anonymous hotline tip alleging war crimes in Vietnam by Boone; Harm and Mac investigate.

programme.title: JAG
programme.desc: The Colonel's Wife : Harm and Mac are sent to Panama to investigate the possibility that the wife of the Marine officer in charge of interdicting drugs from Columbia was smuggling drugs into the US.

programme.title: JAG
programme.desc: Mishap : "Skates", Harm's RIO when he was aboard the USS Patrick Henry, was the Landing Safety Officer in charge of the deck when a Tomcat crashes while making an emergency landing.

programme.title: JAG
programme.desc: Into the Breech : Harm and Mac agree to help guide young student "attorneys" at Iron Forge Naval Academy, a prep school for the US Naval Academy, as they conduct a mock trial.

programme.title: JAG
programme.desc: Boomerang: Part II : Hostilities between Harm and Brumby escalate both in and out of the courtroom and it takes Chegwidden, with Brumby's CO's approval to get them to deal with their anger

programme.title: JAG
programme.desc: People V. Gunny : Gunny is charged with gay-bashing following an off duty altercation outside a gay bar.

programme.title: JAG
programme.desc: The Bridge At Kang So Ri : Harm and Mac board a plane bound for Korea to investigate charges that GI's shot and killed civilians during the Korean War.

programme.title: JAG

programme.title: NCIS Los Angeles
programme.desc: Where There's Smoke : Sam and Callen go undercover as firefighters when top secret information about suspected terrorists is stolen from a secure Department of Defense container at the site of a fire.

programme.title: NCIS Los Angeles
programme.desc: Talion : Season 7 ends with Sam receiving a distress code from his son Aiden that his military school in San Francisco has been taken over by an extremist group led by Tahir, Sam's arch enemy.

programme.title: NCIS Los Angeles
programme.desc: High Value Target : While being carefully monitored by the Under Secretary of the Navy due to the identification of a mole in their department, the team lands an important case involving a Syrian terrorist.

programme.title: NCIS Los Angeles
programme.desc: Belly of the Beast : The team travels to Syria to capture a high-value target, but the mission quickly goes awry.

programme.title: NCIS Los Angeles
programme.desc: Old Tricks : While investigating the kidnapping of a retirement home resident, the NCIS team discovers a pair of con artists who go from home to home scamming the elderly out of their money.

programme.title: NCIS Los Angeles
programme.desc: Queen Pin : Sam assumes a former alias in a risky undercover operation to take down an elusive drug lord; Hetty interrupts Callen and Anna's romantic night to assign them a mission to escort a prisoner.

programme.title: NCIS Los Angeles
programme.desc: Getaway : Nell and Eric go under cover to track a tech-savvy husband and wife linked to the hacking of the U.S. Treasury Department.

programme.title: NCIS Los Angeles
programme.desc: 767 : Callen and Sam go under cover to track an engineer attempting to sell classified information; Deeks plans a surprise for Kensi and her friends.

programme.title: NCIS Los Angeles
programme.desc: From Havana With Love : The team investigates when a defense contractor designing a nuclear attack weapon is suspected, by her husband, of selling Navy secrets to a foreign government.

programme.title: NCIS Los Angeles
programme.desc: Battle Scars : The NCIS team must work with Hetty's former Vietnam War colleagues after a highly decorated Navy captain kidnaps a Veterans Affairs administrator who has been siphoning funds.

programme.title: NCIS Los Angeles
programme.desc: Golden Days : The NCIS team works with Hetty's former Vietnam War colleagues, A.J. Chegwidden, Sterling Bridges and Charles Langston, on a gold heist investigation.

programme.title: NCIS Los Angeles
programme.desc: Uncaged : When Sam's wife, Michelle, is taken from her home, the kidnappers demand that Sam's arch nemesis, Tahir Khaled, be released from prison in exchange for Michelle's whereabouts.

programme.title: NCIS Los Angeles
programme.desc: Unleashed : Sam Hanna goes rogue from the NCIS team in an attempt to stop Tahir Khaled from ever targeting his family again.

programme.title: NCIS Los Angeles
programme.desc: Party Crashers : When Hetty turns in retirement papers and disappears, Shay Mosley comes to Los Angeles to oversee the team and makes staffing changes; Sam insists that Callen find a new partner.

programme.title: NCIS Los Angeles
programme.desc: Se Murio El Payaso : When the daughter of a notorious counterfeiter arrives in Los Angeles, Sam goes under cover as a financier; Callen partners with Anna to track the family's latest scheme.

programme.title: NCIS Los Angeles
programme.desc: Assets : During the murder investigation of a Navy Lieutenant on leave in Los Angeles, the team uncovers classified surveillance briefs she smuggled into the city that may have been sold to a foreign buyer.

programme.title: NCIS Los Angeles
programme.desc: Plain Sight : When weapons worth $1 million are stolen, the team tracks the evidence to a charity event; Mosley gets herself added to the event's guest list, bringing Callen and Sam along as her security detail.

programme.title: NCIS Los Angeles
programme.desc: Mountebank : Sam goes under cover as a day trader after an investment banker who has ties to Russia is murdered; one of Callen's aliases is the victim of credit card theft.

programme.title: The Alamo
programme.desc: John Wayne produces, directs and stars in this retelling of the Alamo, a battle in which 185 men joined together against an army of 7,000. Filmed entirely in Texas, "The Alamo" is a visually stunning and historically accurate celebration of courage.

programme.title: Western Jamboree
programme.desc: Ranch foreman Gene Autry, with the help of Frog Millhouse, turns the Circle J Ranch into a dude ranch to help an old friend fool his daughter's rich fiancé into believing he is a wealthy rancher.

programme.title: Hills Of Utah
programme.desc: Gene Autry returns to the town where his father was murdered and finds a mine owner and cattleman feuding. Things get complicated when a boy dies and the mine owner comes gunning for Gene.

programme.title: Goldtown Ghost Riders
programme.desc: Gene Autry carries the law into a ghost-ridden gold town as a district judge who deals out swift six-gun justice. Gene and Smiley must unravel a murder and a band of outlaws disguised as ghost riders.

programme.title: Mad Dog Morgan
programme.desc: The true story of Irish outlaw Daniel Morgan; who is wanted; dead or alive; in Australia during the 1850s.

programme.title: John Sturges' The Hallelujah Trail
programme.desc: Chaos reigns on the wide open plains as a host of stars, including Burt Lancaster and Lee Remick, have their eyes set on a shipment of whiskey and let loose in this wild comedy that spoofs nearly every convention of movie westerns.

programme.title: Pluto Classic Movie Westerns
programme.desc: no info available

programme.title: The Return Of A Man Called Horse
programme.desc: Richard Harris stars in this superior sequel which follows the plight of a horribly wronged tribe of Sioux Indians and the white man who would join in their revenge.

programme.title: Kit Carson
programme.desc: Indian fighter, trapper and frontier scout Kit Carson leads a wagon train of settlers from Fort Bridger, along the Oregon Trail through Shoshone territory, to California which plans to secede from Mexico.

programme.title: Wild Bill
programme.desc: Wild Bill focuses on the last days of gunfighter, Wild Bill Hickok, consorting in Deadwood with Calamity Jane, observed by a longtime friend, and haunted by the ghosts of his past, from an old flame to a young man who announces his intention to kill Bill.

programme.title: The Singing Cowboy
programme.desc: When Gene Autry's boss is murdered, Gene becomes the guardian of his little girl. The child is seriously injured in a stable fire and needs a lifesaving brain operation!

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Pilot Lights & Sister Fights : Dan opens up to Louise; Darlene yearns for motherhood; Ben's responsibilities for Becky interfere with work.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: CPAPs, Hickeys and Biscuits : Dan and Louise deepen their bond amid the challenges of aging; Darlene's night in jail leaves Ben in charge of parenting; Mark's class experiment with a friend results in hickeys.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Bridge Over Troubled Conners : Darlene and Ben hunt for apartments; Jackie, Becky, and Beverly Rose road trip to Mexico to meet her father; Dan confides financial woes to Louise.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Keep on Truckin' Six Feet Apart : The Conners are dealing with the pandemic and life's financial troubles; the Lunch Box is closed for everything but takeout and delivery.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Halloween and the Election vs. the Pandemic : Mary is devastated that Halloween has been canceled by the city, so Darlene and Becky enlist Jackie and the rest of the family to create an unforgettable experience.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Plastics, Trash Talk & Darlene Antoinette : Darlene isolates herself from her co-workers at Wellman Plastics, leaving them with the impression she is an elitist snob.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Birthdays, Babies and Emotional Support Chickens : It's Beverly Rose's first birthday -- but it's not all cake and candles -- when Becky and Emilio disagree on what kind of party they should have.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Friends in High Places and Horse Surgery : Darlene's friendship with a manager at Wellman Plastics lands her in an awkward situation; Louise's brother tries to win over Jackie.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Protest, Drug Test and One Leaves the Nest : Harris's job is in jeopardy after joining a protest she strongly believes in, leading to tense discussions within the family.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: A Cold Mom, a Brother Daddy and a Prison Baby : Ben's mom arrives after an unexpected death and unveils shocking information from the past; Becky and Emilio spend more time together.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Sex, Lies and House Hunting : Darlene loves the house she's looking at, but when the realtor says she has a chance of getting the house if she's part of a couple, she convinces Ben to pretend to be her partner.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Triggered : The family is locked down in their home due to a shooting incident in the neighborhood.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Messy Situation, Miscommunication and Academic Probation : When Becky outs her relationship with Professor Davis, it's his erratic behavior that sends Becky down a path to reevaluate their relationship.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Gas Pump, House Dump and Stew Volcano : Darlene searches for a home that she and Becky can afford; after an attempt to boost business at The Lunch Box goes awry.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Big Negotiations and Broken Expectations : Dan enlists the help of a few friends for the funeral-home remodel; Louise points out that Dan's generosity with his time benefits everyone but her.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: The Best Laid Plans, a Contrabassoon and a Sinking Feeling : Darlene struggles to cope with the stress of construction; Lou returns as Mark's combative contrabassoon teacher.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Three Ring Circus : Ben and Darlene are excited to share their good news with the family, but Neville and Jackie, and Aldo and Harris, share their own very similar news.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: A Judge and a Priest Walk Into a Living Room… : The Conners gear up for a megawedding; Jackie & Neville, Darlene & Ben, Harris & Aldo are planning for a big day, but discover that some of the couples may not be on the same page.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Double Honeymoon and Seeing Double : In an effort to save money, Darlene and Ben, and Jackie and Neville head off on their joint honeymoon, where their cost-saving measures contribute to a tension-filled getaway.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Scenes From Two Marriages: The Parrot Doth Protest Too Much : When Jackie moves in with Neville, he shows up to their home with an excess of animals from his vet office; Darlene and Ben argue Darlene is turning into her father.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Driving, Dating and Deceit : Mark is anxious to get his driver's license; Darlene attempts to teach Mark to drive, but her frantic energy sends him running to Ben for help; Harris meets a new guy online.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Parent Traps and Heart Attacks : When a relative passes away unexpectedly, the family must debate about who should gain custody of a jaded nephew, who is just shy of his 18th birthday.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: A Little Weed and A Bad Seed : Problems arise on Beverly Rose's first day of kindergarten; Becky and Darlene have a disagreement; Harris advises an unusual solution for Dan's back pain.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Book Bands and Guillotine Hands : The Conners grapple with parenthood, dating, financial pressures, aging and in-laws in working-class America.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Take This Job and Shove It Twice : Darlene receives a promotion, but she quickly learns the fancy title is not all it's cracked up to be; when Louise loses her job at Casita Bonita, an opportunity arises.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Of Missing Minds and Missing Fries : Jackie must come to terms with her mother becoming ill; Darlene's job hunt proves to be more difficult than anticipated.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Crumbs and Couch Surferes : Darlene, Ben, Becky and Beverly Rose move into the new house, where Darlene implements a new set of rules.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: The Dog Days of Christmas : Dan meets his in-laws for the first time when Louise's family comes to visit; Darlene helps Becky with a parenting problem.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Two More Years and A Stolen Rose : The death of a beloved teacher from Dan and Jackie's high school brings old classmates together; Becky asks Darlene and Ben for a big favour.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Stuck in the Middle and Stuck in the Past : Darlene and Ben get into a fight and ignore Becky's boundaries in the house; Dan accuses Jackie of losing all of their home videos.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: New Pipes and Old Secrets : Darlene has issues with Dan's plumbing work in her new house; Jackie tries to find a caregiver for Bev.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Adding Insult to Injury : Darlene continues her search for a new job; Becky is desperate to spend more time with Beverly Rose.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Possums, Pregnancy and Patriarchy : Harris makes a big announcement; Ben is overwhelmed with family responsibilities.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Hiding In and Moving Out : Harris takes her anger out on Darlene; Dan and Louise spend an entire day in bed together.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: The Contra Hearings and the Midnight Gambler : Mark fights for a spot in the Lanford High chamber orchestra; Jackie puts a lottery machine in the Lunch Box.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Road Trip and Guilt Trip : Dan and Jackie take a road trip to a hardware wholesaler in Oklahoma; Darlene heads out of town and leaves behind a plethora of to-do notes for Becky and Ben.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Text Thread and Marrital Bed : Louise gets into a feud with Becky after accidentally sending a rude message in the family text thread; Darlene tries to spice up her sex life with Ben.

programme.title: Pokemon: Adventures in the Orange Islands
programme.desc: Showdown at the Po-Ké Corral : On a visit to Professor Oak’s house, Ash runs into Gary, and they talk about the upcoming Pokémon League. Professor Oak says they should learn from each other rather than competing, and that teamwork pays off when Team Rocket attacks!

programme.title: Pokemon: Adventures in the Orange Islands
programme.desc: The Evolution Solution : Ash and his mother take a vacation to Seafoam Island. While he's there, he's looking for the programmer of the Pokédex to learn about the peculiar evolution of SlowPoké. Team Rocket's bumbling brings to light this surprising mystery!

programme.title: Pokemon: Adventures in the Orange Islands
programme.desc: The Pi-Kahuna : When Ash wipes out during a surfing attempt, Victor rescues him and tells him about Humungadunga, a giant wave that sweeps through every 20 years. Can Ash and Pikachu give Victor the confidence he needs to catch the giant wave?

programme.title: Pokemon: Adventures in the Orange Islands
programme.desc: Make Room for Gloom! : Back in Pallet Town, Ash, and friends meet Florinda, who works at the local nursery. Her Gloom won't evolve, so she’s afraid she's not training it properly. When Team Rocket attacks, everyone sees just how strong a Pokémon can become!

programme.title: Pokemon: Adventures in the Orange Islands
programme.desc: Lights, Camera, Quack-Tion! : Everyone wants to become the star when a famous director arrives in town! Ash, Brock, Misty, and Team Rocket are working hard to ensure their Pokémon will be the ones to star opposite Wigglytuff in his movie as he solely desires them.

programme.title: Pokemon: Adventures in the Orange Islands
programme.desc: Hollywood Heartbreak/Go West Young Meowth : When the gang attends the premiere of 'Pokémon in Love,' Meowth looks back on his painful past. He shares the story of his life before Team Rocket, including how he learned to walk and talk like a human.

programme.title: Pokemon: Adventures in the Orange Islands
programme.desc: To Master the Onixpected : With only three weeks left before the Pokémon League competition, Ash, Brock, and Misty head up to Mt. Hideaway to find one of the Elite Four. They're after Pokémon training tips, but they discover a land of overgrown Onix instead!

programme.title: Pokemon: Adventures in the Orange Islands
programme.desc: The Ancient Puzzle of Pokémopolis : While Ash and Brock train for the Pokémon League, they uncover a hidden temple containing Pokémon fossils. Misty remembers a hidden city where people built temples to honor Pokémon. Could they have stumbled upon the ancient city of Pokémopolis?

programme.title: Pokemon: Adventures in the Orange Islands
programme.desc: Bad to the Bone : Our heroes are headed to the Pokémon League tournament at the Indigo Plateau when they meet another Trainer going their way. Unfortunately, all of his Gym badges have been stolen, so he can't compete…unless he takes Ash's badges instead!

programme.title: Pokemon: Adventures in the Orange Islands
programme.desc: All Fired Up! : The Pokémon League is about to begin with the ceremonial lighting of the torch, which carries a flame from the Legendary Pokémon Moltres. Of course, Team Rocket tries to steal it!

programme.title: Pokemon: Adventures in the Orange Islands
programme.desc: Wherefore Art Thou, Pokémon? : Our heroes meet a couple of Trainers who don't seem to get along at all, even though their Nidoran are obviously smitten with each other. Misty is determined to solve this romantic challenge!

programme.title: Pokemon: Adventures in the Orange Islands
programme.desc: Git Along, Little Pokémon : Slogging through a thunderstorm, our heroes notice a group of Magnemite soaking up electricity from the lightning bolts. When they finally get into town to rest, there's a blackout! Can the Magnemite help?

programme.title: Pokemon: Adventures in the Orange Islands
programme.desc: The Mystery Menace : In Trovitopolis City, Ash and friends hear stories about some kind of monster that's been scaring everyone—and when the ground cracks open and dumps them in the sewer, it seems they might meet this monster face to face!

programme.title: Pokemon: Adventures in the Orange Islands
programme.desc: Misty Meets Her Match : After Misty dives into a whirlpool to rescue a girl, she learns that the girl's brother, Rudy, has a giant crush on her. Things get more complicated when it turns out he's also the Gym Leader Ash must challenge next!

programme.title: Pokemon: Adventures in the Orange Islands
programme.desc: Bound For Trouble : Ash and friends go in search of super-sized Pokémon, but when they fall for a Team Rocket trick, and then Pikachu and Meowth get snatched up by a giant Pidgeot, everyone must work together to get them back!

programme.title: Pokemon: Adventures in the Orange Islands
programme.desc: Charizard Chills : After hearing about Ash from the Trovita Island Gym Leader, another Trainer seeks him out for a battle...and after Pikachu is knocked out, Ash turns to his Charizard. But can he get the unruly Pokémon to listen to him?

programme.title: Pokemon: Adventures in the Orange Islands
programme.desc: The Pokémon Water War : Our heroes’ plans are interrupted by a raging fire in a nearby warehouse. When they try to fight the flames, they quickly find themselves in need of the local fire department: Team Wartortle!

programme.title: Pokemon: Adventures in the Orange Islands
programme.desc: Pokémon Food Fight : When Snorlax's Poké Ball breaks, Ash has a huge problem on his hands: How can our heroes get the slumbering Snorlax over a mountain pass to the nearest Pokémon Center?

programme.title: Pokemon: Adventures in the Orange Islands
programme.desc: Pokémon Double Trouble : Ash is anxious to win the final badge of the Orange League, and soon gets a taste of this Gym Leader’s strength as she helps him fend off another Team Rocket sneak attack!

programme.title: Pokemon: Adventures in the Orange Islands
programme.desc: The Wacky Watcher : Discovering a scientist’s submarine at sea, our heroes are soon surrounded by his life’s research: a school of splashing Magikarp! They want to help him study Magikarp Evolution, but Team Rocket has other ideas…

programme.title: Pokemon: Adventures in the Orange Islands
programme.desc: The Stun Spore Detour : With Ash and Tracey paralyzed by a wild Vileplume’s Stun Spore, it’s up to Misty to find a local plant and save the day!

programme.title: Pokemon: Adventures in the Orange Islands
programme.desc: Hello Pummelo : With his four Orange League badges in hand, Ash has one last challenge to face before he can be crowned Champion of the Orange League. Does he have what it takes?

programme.title: Pokemon: Adventures in the Orange Islands
programme.desc: Enter The Dragonite : Ash’s battle for the Orange League Winner’s Trophy rages on, and it soon becomes apparent that he will have to take on a powerful Dragonite to become the Orange League Champion!

programme.title: Pokemon: Adventures in the Orange Islands
programme.desc: Viva Las Lapras : Trying to rescue a local school of Lapras from would-be poachers, our heroes must find a way to convince these distrustful Pokémon they are friends...before it’s too late!

programme.title: Pokemon: Adventures in the Orange Islands
programme.desc: The Underground Round Up : With Pallet Town on their minds, our heroes are searching for a ferry, but soon discover the port is abandoned...except for some explosive Electrode! Can Ash stop Team Rocket before the ferry goes up in smoke?

programme.title: Pokemon: Adventures in the Orange Islands
programme.desc: A Tent Situation : Ash has an eventful homecoming with a surprise visit from an old friend, a visit to see Professor Oak, and a Team Rocket raid. There’s no place like home!

programme.title: Pokemon: Adventures in the Orange Islands
programme.desc: A Rivalry Revival : After Gary comes to the rescue against Team Rocket, Ash seizes an opportunity…at long last, our hero gets to challenge his rival to their very first Pokémon battle!

programme.title: Pokemon: The Johto Journeys
programme.desc: Don’t Touch That ‘Dile : Ash begins his journey in Johto, a region largely unexplored and populated with Pokémon entirely new to him and his friends.

programme.title: Pokemon: The Johto Journeys
programme.desc: The Double Trouble Header : On the road again, Ash and his Charizard soundly defeat an ambitious rookie Trainer named Casey. Upset, she runs away before Ash can comfort her—the perfect time for Team Rocket to strike!

programme.title: Pokemon: The Johto Journeys
programme.desc: A Sappy Ending : In a forest that's being destroyed by rampaging Pinsir, Ash has to enlist the help of the local Heracross to protect their home! But it turns out these Pokémon look tougher than they act…

programme.title: Pokemon: The Johto Journeys
programme.desc: Roll on, Pokémon! : On their way to Violet City, our heroes arrive in a valley where Donphan are used to harvest precious stones. Needless to say, the Team Rocket villains aren't far behind them!

programme.title: Pokemon: The Johto Journeys
programme.desc: Illusion Confusion : The forest can be a scary place at night, especially when you’re lost! Our heroes will need some help to get out of this mess. It's Hoothoot to the rescue!

programme.title: Pokemon: The Johto Journeys
programme.desc: Flower Power : On their first stop in a city since New Bark Town, our heroes decide to help an insecure Bellossom dance troupe regain their confidence and perform in an upcoming exhibition!

programme.title: Pokemon: The Johto Journeys
programme.desc: Spinarak Attack : Ash and the gang arrive in a town besieged by apparent copycat crimes mimicking a legendary master thief. The town’s hopes lie with these young Trainers...how can they stop this criminal duo and their Meowth accomplice?

programme.title: Pokemon: The Johto Journeys
programme.desc: Snubbull Snobbery : When our heroes return an unhappy Snubbull to its wealthy Trainer, it sparks off a series of events that will change the Pokémon’s life forever!

programme.title: FantomWorks
programme.desc: High Impact : Scott’s 1953 Fleetwood is a monumental challenge that takes a turn to the crazy when Dan has to add rare features that the car never had in the first place. John wants FantomWorks to make his 1967 Mercury Cougar roaring more fiercely than ever.

programme.title: FantomWorks
programme.desc: Tough Act to Follow : For years, Rich and Kathy tried to get their 1951 Buick Super back on the road. It’s now up to FantomWorks to succeed where four other shops failed. Dan has to solve the mystery of Jim’s classic 1961 Corvette and determine if the car needs major surgery.

programme.title: FantomWorks
programme.desc: Beast Mode : FantomWorks dives into prototype hell to give Nick a superfast 1969 Chevrolet Chevelle with an LT4 engine. Barlen wants his mother’s 1957 Chevrolet Bel Air to run like a dream for her birthday. Unfortunately, her birthday is in 30 days.

programme.title: FantomWorks
programme.desc: If it Sprays, It Stays : Dan agrees to fix a 1947 Mack Firetruck that take FantomWorks into wet and uncharted territory. Ken’s 1971 Malibu Chevelle arrives as a garage ornament that hasn't run in five years, so it’s up to FantomWorks to bring this family heirloom back to life.

programme.title: FantomWorks
programme.desc: All Revved Up : Nick challenges Dan to build a 1969 Camaro Pace Car that can beat the fastest Chevelle that FantomWorks has ever built. Pete’s Mustang Convertible was in three different shops, but it arrives with far more problems than anyone was expecting.

programme.title: Counting Cars
programme.desc: Sweet Lambo Of Mine : Former Guns & Roses guitarist DJ Ashba arrives at Count's Kustoms in a 2004 Lamborghini Murcielago that he wants turned into the ultimate "mancar".

programme.title: Counting Cars
programme.desc: Pick Ups and Ponies : Danny gets started on a project that he's been waiting a long time to tackle, a 1971 Chevy C10 Pick Up. He plans to flip it for a big profit.

programme.title: Counting Cars
programme.desc: El Camino Royale : Danny continues his El Caminos love affair with a 1975 beauty.

programme.title: Counting Cars
programme.desc: Snider's Ride : Dee Snider of Twisted Sister stops by Count's Kustoms to have Danny turn his brand new Tesla into a rock and roller's ride.

programme.title: Counting Cars
programme.desc: Boogie Down Buggy : Danny takes in a dune buggy to trick out in outrageous Count's Kustoms style, and then gets into some seriously higher horse powered fare at the Shelby Heritage Foundation.

programme.title: Counting Cars
programme.desc: Caddylicious : Danny and the team take on a 1967 Caddy for a high end client, but will Ryan and Danny's plan to match the unique interior with a root beer paint job fly, or fizzle?

programme.title: Counting Cars
programme.desc: Lego My Caddy : Danny has big plans for a big client. But will his evil twist on a classic Caddy impress the high rolling buyer, or leave him all out of gas?

programme.title: Counting Cars
programme.desc: Blinged Out Blazer : Danny's got himself a new ride, a classic two wheel drive Chevy Blazer that he wants to trick out and flip for a big profit.

programme.title: Counting Cars
programme.desc: Twisted Chopper : Dee Snider from Twisted Sister drops by the shop to get a new "Sugar Bear" front end put on his Von Dutch chopper. Danny makes a road trip to LA to pick up the front end.

programme.title: Counting Cars
programme.desc: Back in Time : Two brothers want to surprise their dad with the ultimate car guy gift; a fully restored 1957 Special Edition T-Bird that's been sitting in their pasture. Can Danny bring it back to her original glory'

programme.title: Counting Cars
programme.desc: 70s Scoot : Danny takes on a psychedelic chopper project that is so 70s cool, he's worried he might not be able to give it to the customer when it's done.

programme.title: Counting Cars
programme.desc: True Fire Fiasco : A memorial bike project poses a series of challenges for the paint team after builder Shannon doesn't get all the necessary information from the customer.

programme.title: FantomWorks
programme.desc: One Salty Shelby : Dennis has always dreamed of owning the bright orange 1970 Shelby GT500 that kicked his ass in a drag race. Returning customer Rikk wants to get his rare 1970 Chrysler 300 Hurst in shape. But the car is plagued by a mystifying list of gremlins.

programme.title: FantomWorks
programme.desc: One Tough Customer : Robby wants to convert a 1926 Ford Model T to a far rarer 1914 C Cab. Dan agrees to the plan, but soon has cause to regret it. Anthony buys a 69 Chevrolet Camaro Convertible, but the car of his dreams is an accident waiting to happen.

programme.title: FantomWorks
programme.desc: Night Prowler : Brothers Jacob and Paul’s 1965 Chevy Impala nicknamed the Night Prowler would have been better named the Night Slug. Don shows up with a 1967 Corvette and a massive list of work that he wants done. Dan doesn’t know which is worse: the list, or the car.

programme.title: FantomWorks
programme.desc: Beauty and the Bee : When Ovide purchased his 1957 Bel Air sight unseen, the car was a rusted piece of junk so it’s on Dan to figure out how to restore this classic. Dino loves to go fast. His 1969 Super Bee is anything but super. Dan is tasked to feed Dino’s need for speed.

programme.title: FantomWorks
programme.desc: Rags to Riches : Nick bought his wife Danielle a 1953 Chevy Pickup for her 28th birthday. The couple wants a perfect FantomWorks restoration. The truck has other ideas. Eric’s rare 1939 LaSalle is a sight to behold, but it hasn’t seen a wrench in eighty years.

programme.title: FantomWorks
programme.desc: Perfect 10 : Mike thought his 1967 Chevy K10 Pick Up needed paint improvement. Dan quickly realizes that the car needs much more. Nobody restores 1970 Opel Kadett, so there are no parts anywhere for Harry’s car that needs a lot of everything.

programme.title: FantomWorks
programme.desc: FantomWorks Goes Postal : Ron and Valerie want Dan to restore their 1963 Jeep Willy’s Fleetvan, but the problems run deeper than the seams hidden beneath inches of filler. Grady’s Z28 breaks down so often that he’s never had it out of second gear.

programme.title: FantomWorks
programme.desc: Shake And Bake : John thinks his 1958 Corvette is ‘mostly original’ but Dan finds a mismatched assortment of poor-quality parts and bad repairs. Chelsea wants FantomWorks to fix up a rare 1971 Fury for her father, Rikk. The car has previously caught on fire 3 times!

programme.title: The Martha Stewart Channel
programme.desc: no info available

programme.title: Martha Stewart's Cooking School
programme.desc: Onions : French onion soup; balsamic-glazed pearl onions; fried onion rings.

programme.title: Martha Stewart's Cooking School
programme.desc: Roasting : Roast rack of lamb; salt-roasted sea bass; saffron-roasted chicken wings.

programme.title: Martha Bakes
programme.desc: White Bread : Basic Japanese-style white bread loaf; cinnamon raisin swirl bread; jalapeno-cheddar rolls.

programme.title: Martha Bakes
programme.desc: South Atlantic : Virginia peanut pie; Lady Baltimore cake; strawberry shortcake.

programme.title: Martha Bakes
programme.desc: Updated Classics : Rhubarb and raspberry rye crisps; flaky buttermilk barley biscuits; spelt layer cake with whipped cream and berries.

programme.title: Martha Bakes
programme.desc: Coffee Shop Favorites : Apple cider doughnut cake with whole grain wheat flour and applesauce; maple-glazed pumpkin spelt scones; seeded graham biscotti.

programme.title: Martha Bakes
programme.desc: Flour Power : Custardy-herb quiche with a malty rye crust; blueberry coffee cake with muesli topping; a seeded quick bread.

programme.title: Martha Bakes
programme.desc: Seeded : Seeded whole-wheat English muffins; seeded Saratoga torte; light and crispy whole-grain seeded wafer crackers.

programme.title: Martha Gardens
programme.desc: The Incredible World of Orchids : Martha visits the incredible Orchid Show at the New York Botanical Garden; this year's show immerses you in a mesmerizing array of orchids designed by acclaimed artist Lily Kwong.

programme.title: Martha Gardens
programme.desc: Hens and Chicks : Now with over 200 chickens and 20 different breeds, Martha shares her vast knowledge about raising and caring for her flock; learn the how-tos of building a coop.

programme.title: Martha Gardens
programme.desc: Martha Builds a Raised Bed Vegetable Garden : Martha builds a brand new, half-acre raised bed vegetable garden on her farm! It's a step-by-step guide to designing, building, preparing the soil, and planting.

programme.title: Martha Gardens
programme.desc: Everything's Coming Up Roses : Everything is coming up roses on Martha's Bedford farm; Martha is creating a brand new rose garden with almost 200 roses; from color to fragrance, the inspired world of roses is a very good thing.

programme.title: Martha Cooks
programme.desc: Vegan Cuisine Redefined : Martha and Chef Daniel Humm make redefined vegan dishes; Martha and Chef Daniel make a refreshing cocktail and gazpacho, followed by mushroom and seaweed baked rice and a rhubarb cobbler for dessert.

programme.title: Martha Cooks
programme.desc: Authentic Greek Cuisine : Martha and Chef Costas Spiliadis of Estiatorio Milos make Taramosalata and salad; they build an eggplant and zucchini tower with tzatziki; then, they salt-bake a fish served with yogurt.

programme.title: Martha Cooks
programme.desc: Jean-Georges and the Tin Building : Martha tours NYC's Tin Building, guided by chef and owner Jean-Georges; Martha is then joined by three Tin Building chefs and makes a lemon pizza, french onion soup, and chili mala chicken.

programme.title: Martha Cooks
programme.desc: The Art of Raw Food : Martha and Omar Abou-Ismail make miso soup and a bean-free hummus with flatbread made with raw ingredients; Martha and Omar whip up a tabouli salad followed by sweet potato fries.

programme.title: Martha Cooks
programme.desc: Baking Baguettes and Breads : Martha tours Breads Bakery with owner Gadi Paleg and learns about their award-winning baked goods; Martha and bakers make Breads Bakery's baguette, challah, and egg sandwich.

programme.title: Martha Cooks
programme.desc: Chef David Burke's Modern Classics : Chef David Burke brings his modern classic dishes to Martha's kitchen; a bacon clothesline, calamari noodles, miso chicken with ginger and vegetables, and key lime pie are on the menu.

programme.title: Martha Cooks
programme.desc: Martha Throws a Clam Bake : Martha heads to her local seafood market, Mt. Kisco Seafood, to pick-up the perfect ingredients for a clam bake; broiled salmon and delicious creamed spinach.

programme.title: Martha Stewart's Cooking School
programme.desc: Know Your Vegetables : Steamed artichokes with tarragon butter; braised leeks; fried okra; whole-roasted garlic.

programme.title: Martha Stewart's Cooking School
programme.desc: Sauces : Bearnaise sauce; Kansas City barbecue sauce; tartar sauce with capers, shallots and cornichons; cocktail sauce; salsa verde.

programme.title: Martha Stewart's Cooking School
programme.desc: Pork : Porchetta, a highly seasoned roasted pork; glazed ham; pork and plums.

programme.title: Martha Stewart's Cooking School
programme.desc: Potatoes : Scalloped potatoes; potato salad; pureed potatoes; smashed potatoes.

programme.title: Martha Stewart's Cooking School
programme.desc: Salads : Frisee aux lardons; Caesar salad; stacked butter lettuce with citrus and yuzu vinaigrette.

programme.title: Martha Stewart's Cooking School
programme.desc: Corn : Corn fritters; corn stock serves as the base for summer corn chowder; homemade creamed corn.

programme.title: Martha Stewart's Cooking School
programme.desc: Eat Your Greens : Sorrel soup; pasta with grilled sardines and bitter greens; Swiss chard frittata; kale Caesar salad; escarole.

programme.title: Martha Stewart's Cooking School
programme.desc: One-Pot Meals : Stovetop clambake in a stockpot; risotto with shrimp and herbs in a pressure cooker; poached cod with tomatoes in a skillet; arroz con pollo in a Dutch oven.

programme.title: Martha Stewart's Cooking School
programme.desc: Steakhouse : Baked stuffed clams; searing a porterhouse steak; creamed spinach; baked potatoes with various garnishes.
